annotation_target.structure: B section continuation — fuller LH, half cadence on G
key_moments: m13 phrase continues in C major
teaching_goals: feel the half cadence as preparation for A theme return
style_tips: the half cadence should feel expectant — not finished
slight ritardando before A theme return

teaching_notes.note: The dominant G cadence is a door back to the A theme — leave it open.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 13–16 of Fur Elise (Bagatelle No. 25 in A minor) (continuation of mm. 9–12), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 13–16 and describe how the B section continues.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 13–16.

Measures 13–16 continue the B section in the relative major, completing the phrase. The LH adds fuller support. The phrase settles on a half cadence that prepares the return to the A theme. Let me loop mm. 13–16.
Für Elise mm. 13–16: B section continuation, fuller LH, half cadence preparing A theme return. Pairs with mm. 9–12.
